body.title: agent_datacenter: SWADL device stub — spec at implementation time
body.result: SwadlDevice stub implemented in agent_datacenter/devices/swadl/device.py — health=degraded with clear message. Contract tests pass.
body.description:
SWADL (~/dev/src/swadl) device registration stub. Full spec at implementation time once SWADL API stabilizes. File now to reserve the slot; sprint when SWADL is ready.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/devices/swadl/device.py:
  class SWADLDevice(BaseDevice): — full BaseDevice with stub implementations
  who_am_i() → {'name': 'swadl', 'version': 'TBD', 'purpose': 'structured workflow agent definition language'}
  All health/ops methods return sensible stubs
  Note in class docstring: 'Full spec pending SWADL API stabilization. See ~/dev/src/swadl for current state.'

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/swadl/device.py
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/swadl/shim.py (stub)

Design rules:
- oop-first: SWADLDevice class with stub methods — no abstract methods left unimplemented

Scope boundary:
IN: stub device + stub shim that compiles and passes contract tests
OUT: any real SWADL integration (future ticket after SWADL API stabilizes)

Test plan:
- SWADLDevice() instantiates (no abstract methods missing)
- SWADLDevice passes T-adc-test-device-contract-suite parametrized test
- No import of swadl package — stub only
